title: Verify existing implementation of notification system
description: The notification system described in the task is already fully implemented: model at src/models/notification.ts with NotificationSeverity and Notification types, service at src/services/notifications.ts with CRUD and mark-as-read methods, API routes at src/routes/notifications.ts with GET/POST handlers, helpers at src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts with formatting/filtering utilities, and comprehensive tests in notifications.test.ts and notificationHelpers.test.ts. Verify the implementation meets the task requirements.
existing_patterns: src/models/notification.ts: Domain model with NotificationSeverity type and Notification interface
src/services/notifications.ts: Service class wrapping Payload SDK with dependency injection pattern
src/routes/notifications.ts: Express-style route handlers with withAuth HOC and typed responses
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts: Pure utility functions with co-located test files following src/utils/*.ts convention
src/collections/Notifications.ts: Payload collection for data persistence
